title: Framework card — a skimmable, deployable tool for the advisor
description: One line of frameworks/cards.jsonl. A framework card is a reusable diagram/heuristic the advisor deploys on a problem. CITED cards are grounded in a real book figure and outrank DERIVED cards, which must be labeled so an agent never treats a derived card as a book citation.

structure.description: the shape of the tool (axes, branches, steps)

reframes_question.description: the question the card makes the user ask

figure.description: e.g. '4.1' — REQUIRED for cited, FORBIDDEN for derived

note.description: derived cards MUST say 'derived, not cited'

verbatim_probe.description: a short string that is VERBATIM in the source near the figure/principle
